mapper.sql: id, user_id, entry_date, title, content, mood, weather, location, tags, is_private, is_favorite, word_count, reading_time, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM diary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY entry_date DESC, created_time DESC
SELECT FROM diary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND entry_date = #{entryDate} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM diary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND mood = #{mood} ORDER BY entry_date DESC, created_time DESC

SELECT FROM diary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY entry_date DESC, created_time DESC
SELECT FROM diary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_favorite = true ORDER BY entry_date DESC, created_time DESC
